svg.g:
Operating System Operations
<rect x="10" y="60" width="400" height="100" fill="#3498DB" rx="20" data-narration="Boolean Algebra is a branch of mathematics that deals with variables that have two possible values: **true (1)** and **false (0)\""/>
<rect x="10" y="280" width="400" height="100" fill="#3498DB" rx="20" data-narration="AND Operation (Conjunction): Outputs **1** only when **all inputs are 1\""/> <rect x="10" y="390" width="400" height="100" fill="#3498DB" rx="20" data-narration="OR Operation (Disjunction): Outputs **1** when **at least one input is 1\""/> <rect x="10" y="590" width="400" height="100" fill="#3498DB" rx="20" data-narration="NOT Operation (Negation/Complement): Inverts the input\""/>
<path d="M 240, 260 L 290, 260 L 290, 300 L 240, 300 Z" stroke="#3498DB" stroke-width="2" fill="none" data-narration="Derived Operations: XOR: Outputs **1** when inputs are **different\""/> <path d="M 240, 260 L 290, 260 L 290, 300 L 240, 300 Z" stroke="#3498DB" stroke-width="2" fill="none" data-narration="Derived Operations: XNOR: Outputs **1** when inputs are **same\""/>
